So it might actually be a sensible time to start.

But what else do you need to sort of, I think would be good if Willow you can wrap up what else we need to see and if there's anything that you usually feel like is part of a good process to elaborate, like to really figure out if this partnership makes sense.
What else, Tyler, is needed from your end?
Yeah, for sure.
I can send over our SoW so we can get that process in motion.
In terms of like more that I would need from my end, not too much.
I can tell that the team would be very collaborative.
The content is definitely in scope.
You know, sometimes it's like more conversations are needed.
And the subject matter is, like, highly, highly technical or, you know, whenever it's futuristic and so, like, the content, the opinions are still being formed on it.
It's not to say we can't do that stuff.
It's just, like, a lot more due diligence is required in those conversations.
I think it's really just about making sure that you all feel confident about what you get out of the partnership and that I do a good enough job there.
So you are moving into phase one with, um, you know, skepticism or nerves or fear, even.
Um, so I know, like, one thing I said on the first call is, like, going a bit deeper into, like, the content opportunity against your competitors.
And candidly, like, I've been doing my best to, like, ramp up there, but I've had to work with a guy on our delivery team who is just very involved in delivery.
So I think, you know, we can have that conversation in November or December, for sure, Willow, just to make sure that you feel really good about the partnership.
But, um, it's really just the SOW from here.
Yeah, because.

I mean, honestly, that's the other question I had on my list here, because you asked us about core competitors, we haven't heard anything about it, so I think it would be, if you're comfortable, it would be great if we could fix a start date in January, while we're still really also on both ends, looking into finalizing some of the open questions, would be good to understand the opportunities you see, based on sort of the competitors we've named, but as we do that, already locking in something for January, because I think if we go much later than that, I think there's a point where it maybe doesn't make sense, but maybe we can lock that in, start some redlining, but also still, like, make sure that we fully understand where the mutual potential lies, and getting answered to all the questions we still have.
Yeah, it makes a lot of sense.
sense.
I think that, you
You know, you definitely have a good idea of, like, what we do and what we don't do, right?
Like, what is our service offering and, like, what is out of scope?
I think we're aligned there.
I think it's more about, like, is there enough opportunity, right, to capture, but not, you know, like, can GrowthX do it?
It's more so, like, are we going to get enough ROI from GrowthX coming in and creating net new and refresh articles, you know, every business day of the week?
Yeah, and just one final question.
Do your, the customer, your customers still also deploy tools like Profound in addition to having you sort of, like, on the ground?
Or do you use some of the, the tracking, the reporting, showing opportunity?
Is that already something that's to some extent, or to what extent is that covered by partnering with you?
Yeah, you could look into Scrunch a little bit, but Scrunch is, like, a Profound competitor, and we would give you access
To as many prompts as you want to track in scrunch across as many topics and all the different LLM tools.
So you don't need to have Profound if you are going to move forward with growthx.
Do you not have access to your scrunch instance or account as part of the partnership?
Or how does that look like there's a part of the interface that we access by you where we can access scrunch?
Or how exactly does that?
Let me confirm if clients can log in, but I know that there's like a completely separate dashboard from client to client.
And each dashboard like has topics specific to that client, as many prompts as they want to track within those topics.
I just don't know like the method of whether we screen share and send reporting or whether you could like log in and access on your own.
Okay, cool.
That would be maybe helpful to understand.
All right.
But yeah, I think I can confirm a date like once you confirm your desire to move forward.
you know, like if you're like- Yeah.
Hey, we're, we're going to move forward as long as we can like reach alignment on search.
I can do it then, but I can't really do it before then at the same time.
Like, you know, it's not going to be like, things are going to change by mid November.
Like we're not going to like, you don't, don't worry about like rushing to a decision.
Um, I think like I need to do some more work to make you feel confident, Willow, that it's the right partnership.
So let's make sure we like start there.
And then after that conversation, you know, just let me know.
One way or another, you guys are really interested in moving forward, not sure, or don't want to move forward.
Um, cause I can't like, it's just like the demand is crazy and I just can't like reserve dates until we know that we're going to partner, you know, and it's just a matter of legal at that point.
Yeah.

I mean, maybe you just sent us the legal stuff so we can have a look, um, and in parallel and Willow is gonna like make sure that we have all the answers because I mean, it doesn't, we also want to spare you the work unless it's actually really, really, really fit from.

I think I could see some content samples, and if possible talk to someone, one of your customers, I know that it's a fairly new agency that there's not like a ton of customer stories and stuff like that, if someone would be happy to chat to me, that would be great, and yeah, and if I could see some samples of the type of content that's being produced, that would also be great, I think that would help us feel more comfortable, fully confirming that we want to move forward.
Perfect, perfect.

Yeah, Willow, give me like two weeks, and let's like set up our next call in two weeks, and in that meeting, we can have like a much more practical conversation around like some of the concerns that you have, so that after that meeting, you can kind of make a decision one way or the other.
Yeah.
Cool.
Well, good to see you all again, and thanks for the time.
See you later.
Thanks, Tyler.
Good to talk.
Have a good Monday.
Bye.
All right, you too.
Have fun in Barcelona.
See ya.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize evaluation of GrowthX's content services and partnership model.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Two-Phase Model:** An 8-week, $30k Strategy Sprint (Phase 1) produces 5–10 articles and a roadmap. This is a low-risk trial, as clients can opt out before committing to the 12-month, $15k/mo Growth Execution (Phase 2).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Scope & Pricing:** Phase 2 delivers \~20 articles/mo (new or refresh), including SEO strategy and CMS publishing. The service is editorial-only and does not cover custom design or lead magnet creation.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX is booked for 2025. A January 2026 kickoff is the earliest available, but the date cannot be reserved until Leapsome confirms its intent to partner.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Leapsome will review the SOW, content samples, and a competitor analysis before making a decision. A follow-up call is set for two weeks to discuss the analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Model & Team Structure

  - [**Quality Control:** GrowthX manages demand by limiting kickoffs to two per week and vetting clients for a long-term content mindset.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $30k)**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
          - [**Goal:** Build trust and demonstrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** SEO audit, content roadmap, and 5–10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
          - [**Team:** A dedicated sprint team, with Chief of Staff Marcel often joining the kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
          - [**Decision Point:** Leapsome can opt out before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12 months, $15k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
          - [**Goal:** Execute the roadmap at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
          - [**Team:** Stable pod of 3: Managing Director (strategy), Managing Editor (content/SEO), and Content Manager (execution/comms).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Communication & Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Primary:** Slack for daily comms.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Content:** Google Docs for drafts, Airtable for roadmap management.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Documentation:** Notion for notes and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Scope of Work & Pricing

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint ($30,000)**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [8-week engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
      - [Includes SEO audit, content roadmap, and 5–10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution ($15,000/month)**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [12-month commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** \~20 articles/month (5/week).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**Scope:** Includes SEO strategy, content creation, and CMS publishing (Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** The 20-article quota can be a mix of new content and refreshes, which is critical for Leapsome's strategy of optimizing core content.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
  - [**Out of Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [Custom design or web development.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [Creation of new lead magnet templates (e.g., PDFs).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [**Note:** GrowthX can fill existing templates with content but will not design them.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Performance Tracking & Reporting

  - [**North Star Metric:** GrowthX aligns with Leapsome's key metric, SAOs (Sales Accepted Opportunities).](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**Attribution:** GrowthX will tag its content in Leapsome's HockeyStack dashboard to track the full funnel impact.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**LLM Monitoring:** GrowthX provides access to Scrunch, an internal tool and Profound competitor, to track content citations in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2371.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Weekly meetings use dashboards (Looker, Scrunch) to review performance and adapt strategy based on data.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
      - [Send SOW for review.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
      - [Send content samples.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
      - [Arrange a customer reference call.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2524.0)
      - [Prepare a competitor analysis for the next call.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
  - [**Willow & Jenny:**](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
      - [Review SOW and samples.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call in \~2 weeks to discuss the competitor analysis and finalize the decision.](https://fathom.video/share/1GNjZ3HooM6mbVBz-E8e4yWeNxWoyWgx?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)

action_items.description: Confirm lead-magnet template support w/ team; update Willow/Jenny
Email Willow/Jenny: SOW/contract + writing samples + Scrunch access + client ref
Schedule Nov/Dec competitor/opportunity review w/ Willow
Schedule follow-up call w/ Willow/Jenny in 2 weeks
